tagline: Old School Hospitality, Modern Pool Care

hero.headline: LA's Family-Owned Pool Pros Since Day One
hero.subheadline: Pop's Pool Service blends old school hospitality with modern expertise. We handle the chemicals, the cleaning, and the repairs — so all you do is enjoy the water.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Complete Pool Care for<br class="hidden md:block"> Every LA Homeowner
services.subtitle: From weekly maintenance to emergency repairs, Pop's handles it all so you never have to worry about your pool again.

cards.title: Weekly Pool Maintenance
cards.description: Surface skimming, vacuuming, tile brushing, chemical balancing, and filter checks. We email you a full report after every visit with pH stats and chemicals used.

cards.title: Equipment Repair & Install
cards.description: Pumps, heaters, filters, salt systems — diagnosed and fixed same-day. We carry parts on our trucks so most repairs are completed in a single visit.

cards.title: Green Pool Recovery
cards.description: Pool turned swamp green? We'll restore it to crystal clear in 48-72 hours with our proven recovery process. Emergency same-day response available.

cards.title: Water Chemistry Management
cards.description: Precise chemical balancing tailored to your pool's unique needs. Saltwater, chlorine, or mineral — we keep it safe, clear, and gentle on skin.

cards.title: Acid Wash & Deep Clean
cards.description: Remove calcium buildup, stains, and algae with professional acid washing. Restores your pool's surface to like-new condition.

cards.title: Leak Detection & Plumbing
cards.description: Non-invasive electronic leak detection pinpoints problems fast. We repair plumbing lines, valves, and fittings with minimal disruption to your yard.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to a Worry-Free Pool

steps.title: Call or Text Us
steps.description: Reach out at (818) 600-4854 or fill out our form. We'll give you an honest, no-pressure quote within 24 hours — often sooner.

steps.title: We Show Up On Time, Every Time
steps.description: Our CPO-certified, background-checked techs arrive on your scheduled day. Cleaning, chemicals, equipment checks — handled while you're at work or relaxing inside.

steps.title: Dive Into a Sparkling Pool
steps.description: Your pool stays swim-ready year-round. After every visit you get an email summary with pH levels, chemicals added, and any notes. That's the Pop's difference.

about.label: Why LA Trusts Pop's
about.headline: A Family Business That Treats Your Pool Like Our Own
about.description: Pop's Pool Service was built on one idea: treat every customer's pool like it's in our own backyard. We're a family-owned crew operating out of the San Fernando Valley, serving 30+ neighborhoods across Los Angeles. Our CPO-certified technicians carry full insurance and years of hands-on experience — and they genuinely care about getting it right.

features.title: Licensed, Insured & Certified
features.description: DPH #PR0315023, CPO #C-114137. Every technician is background-checked and carries full liability insurance for your peace of mind.

features.title: No Contracts. Cancel Anytime.
features.description: We earn your trust every visit. No long-term commitments, no cancellation fees — just consistent, reliable pool care week after week.

features.title: After-Service Email Reports
features.description: After every cleaning you receive a detailed email with pH balance, chemical readings, what was added, and any maintenance notes. Full transparency, always.

pricing.headline: Simple Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Pick the plan that fits your pool. Upgrade, downgrade, or cancel anytime — no contracts, no hidden fees. First month is 50% off.

guarantee.headline: Our "Crystal Clear" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you're not 100% happy with any service visit, call us and we'll come back to make it right — completely free. No questions, no runaround. We've built our reputation on doing right by our neighbors, and we plan to keep it that way.

testimonials.name: David M.
testimonials.text: Switched to Pop's after a bad experience with another company. Night and day difference — they actually show up when they say they will, the pool looks incredible, and I love getting the email report after each visit. Highly recommend.

testimonials.name: Jessica T.
testimonials.text: Came home from a two-week trip to a swamp. Called Pop's on Monday morning, they were out Tuesday, and by Thursday it was crystal clear. The communication throughout was excellent. These guys are the real deal.

testimonials.name: Robert & Linda S.
testimonials.text: We've used Pop's for over a year now and couldn't be happier. Professional, on-time, and our pool has never looked better. The fact that there's no contract makes it even better — they earn our business every single week.

footer.description: Family-owned pool service in the San Fernando Valley. Serving 30+ LA neighborhoods with old school hospitality and modern expertise.

faqs.question: How fast can you start servicing my pool?
faqs.answer: Most new clients are on the schedule within 3-5 business days. For green pool emergencies, we offer same-day or next-day response. Just call (818) 600-4854 and we'll get you set up.

faqs.question: Do I need to be home when you come?
faqs.answer: Not at all. Most of our clients provide gate access and go about their day. After every visit, you'll receive a detailed email report with pH levels, chemicals added, and any notes — so you always know exactly what happened.

faqs.question: Are your technicians licensed and insured?
faqs.answer: Yes. Every Pop's technician is CPO-certified, background-checked, and carries full liability insurance. We hold DPH License #PR0315023 and CPO Certification #C-114137. Your home is in good hands.

faqs.question: What if I want to cancel my service?
faqs.answer: Cancel anytime — zero fees, zero hassle. We don't do contracts because we believe in earning your business every single visit. If you ever want to pause or stop, just let us know.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve in Los Angeles?
faqs.answer: We serve 30+ neighborhoods across LA including Encino, Sherman Oaks, Woodland Hills, Calabasas, Beverly Hills, Burbank, Glendale, North Hollywood, Tarzana, Hidden Hills, and the entire San Fernando Valley.
